title: Quiet Roads
storyPurpose: Travel montage; team divided; companions reflect tension.

panels.description: Fractured terrain ridge: party small against black chasm fog; cyan underlights.
Nira Quill: uncertain hunter, lean, weather cloak, quill-knife kit, conflicted eyes walking alone ahead; Bramblefox glancing back protectively.

Cael Vesper the Lanternmaster: mid-40s, warm brown skin, silver-threaded dark hair, deep blue and ember-gold coat, brass lantern clasps, half-mask of painted wood with nested lantern motif adjusting lantern clasps; transmitter bulge unseen in companion-care pouch.

bubbles.text: Just reach the Gate. Then they free you.
bubbles.speaker: Cael Vesper

panels.description: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes and Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot with egg between them; Mossprig close; quiet bond.

bubbles.text: We keep the egg. We keep each other.
bubbles.speaker: Mira Eggwarden

dialogue.text: Just reach the Gate. Then they free you.
dialogue.speaker: Cael Vesper

dialogue.text: We keep the egg. We keep each other.
dialogue.speaker: Mira Eggwarden

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Black stone, pale silver metal, moss and timber first; cyan Rift light, deep red warning runes, restrained violet gate shimmer as accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy neon default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "The Traitor's Gate" Issue #7, STORY PAGE 5/25 — Quiet Roads. Story purpose: Travel montage; team divided; companions reflect tension. Layout: four-strip. 4 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p5a): Fractured terrain ridge: party small against black chasm fog; cyan underlights. Panel 2 (p5b): Nira Quill: uncertain hunter, lean, weather cloak, quill-knife kit, conflicted eyes walking alone ahead; Bramblefox glancing back protectively. Panel 3 (p5c): Cael Vesper the Lanternmaster: mid-40s, warm brown skin, silver-threaded dark hair, deep blue and ember-gold coat, brass lantern clasps, half-mask of painted wood with nested lantern motif adjusting lantern clasps; transmitter bulge unseen in companion-care pouch. Panel 4 (p5d): Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes and Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot with egg between them; Mossprig close; quiet bond. Characters: mira-eggwarden, nira-quill, cael-vesper. Creatures: spark, bramblefox, mossprig, dormant-egg. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Keeper lock: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes. Egg lock: dormant Riftborn egg: warm oval shell with cyan-amber seam markings, soft pulse glow, no full hatch — visually identical across pages. Oathwarden lock: Oathwarden Seraph: tall ceremonial black-and-silver armor, split judgment mask, cyan oath flame, long judgment spear, broken Keeper cloak, floating lock rings, one armor side corrupted, orbiting memory mirrors. Environment: Traitor Gate approaches. Time: day. Lighting: black stone with cyan rift accents. Continuity: {"location": "fractured-approach", "team": "divided"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike, Cal Reed, Voltkit
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes; Gate text formal.
artAlt: Quiet Roads — The Traitor's Gate page 5
transcript: NARRATION: Suspicion makes every mile longer.
THOUGHT (Cael Vesper): Just reach the Gate. Then they free you.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): We keep the egg. We keep each other.
